entries.name: Audio oscillator tone
entries.description: Oscillator → Audio Scope + Audio Output (wired Audio bus). Sweep 220–880 Hz is on by default. Enable the output engine, then toggle Gate for a safe test tone.

entries.name: Audio lab
entries.description: Microphone → Plotter (RMS/Peak/Centroid) + Audio Scope + Audio Output (wired Audio bus). Enable mic and the output engine, then use Gate/Gain to listen safely.

entries.name: Audio file playback
entries.description: Audio File Player → Audio Scope + Audio Output (wired Audio bus) + Plotter (time/duration). Paste a URL, enable the output engine, then Play.

entries.name: Audio machine RPM
entries.description: Ramp (0→1) → Audio Machine.Speed → Audio Scope + Audio Output (wired Audio bus). Enable the output engine to hear EV motor whine rise with the ramp.

entries.name: Audio machine (Map Range)
entries.description: Sine (−1..1) → Map Range (0..1) → Industrial Audio Machine.Speed → Scope + Output. Wire Threshold → Trigger for press clanks.

entries.name: Audio machine fault lab
entries.description: Sine → Map Range → Machine.Speed; Threshold (>0.88) → Machine.Trigger + SFX beep. Press preset clanks on peaks; enable Audio Output to listen.

entries.name: Camera video texture
entries.description: Camera Input → Video Texture + Vision Pose (wired Video bus). Enable the camera node and allow browser permission; pose outputs update when MediaPipe model loads.

entries.name: Stage + Scene Output
entries.description: Model Source (PSoC E84 pack model) → **Scene Output** (+ optional **Environment**). Open the **Stage** workbench pane to preview the full viewport; use **Model Viewer** separately for in-graph authoring.

entries.name: Stage camera + vision
entries.description: Stage + Scene Output with **Camera Input**, screen **CSS3D Camera Feed**, and **Vision Pose**. Open **Stage** for the 3D view; vision status chips appear top-right when inference runs.

entries.name: Material drives
entries.description: Model Source (PSoC E84 pack model) → **Model Viewer** + linked **Material Property** (roughness slider) and **Material Texture** (sample bridge face on **map**). Re-bind material names via Library **Model → Materials** if your model uses different refs.

entries.name: Rotation + animation
entries.description: BMI270 Euler → 3D Rotation with **Animation Clips** + **On Click → Play Animation** (pack default model). Bind a clip on the trigger/bundle, then click empty canvas to fire.

entries.name: Animation clip blend
entries.description: Model Source → **Model Viewer** with two **Animation Clip** nodes → **Animation Blend** (Sine → Map Range drives **Factor**). Clips auto-bind from the pack GLB when it exposes animations.

entries.name: Animation mix demo
entries.description: Model Source (**TESA drone**) → three **Animation Clip** nodes → **Animation Mix** → **Model Viewer**. Sine → Map Range drives the first mix weight socket (**wa**); clips auto-bind when the GLB loads.

entries.name: Part spin demo
entries.description: Model Source (**TESA drone**) → **Model Viewer** with two **Part Spin** nodes (auto-bind first rotor parts). Sine → Map Range → spin A speed.

entries.name: Signal chain
entries.description: Sensor Input → Low pass → Threshold → Indicator + Bar meter + Sparkline — good default for live telemetry demos.

entries.name: Basic indicator
entries.description: Minimal LED indicator wired to a scalar tap.

entries.name: Gauge monitor
entries.description: Gauge + numeric display for a single sensor channel.

entries.name: Vector magnitude
entries.description: Vector (3, 4, 0) → Vector Length → bar meter (expects 5). No hardware required.

entries.name: BMI270 gauge (Z)
entries.description: Accelerometer Z axis into a gauge node.
